claimText: • Nuclear Cooperation: Focus on operation and maintenance of the Barakah Nuclear Power Plant by India.

claimText: • Key Energy Partner: UAE is India’s 4th largest source of crude oil and the 2nd largest source of LNG & LPG.

claimText: o Strategic Oil Reserves: UAE is the only nation in the region to offer to store strategic oil reserves in India.

claimText: • Deepening Economic Integration: UAE is the only country with which India has both a trade agreement—CEPA, 2022—and an investment agreement—Bilateral Investment Treaty (BIT, 2023).
